name: @alecsibilia/commit
description: Interactive CLI tool for creating standardized commit messages with customizable types and scopes
author: Alec Sibilia <sibilia.alec@gmail.com>

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && bun build --minify --sourcemap ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json
scripts.build:dev: mkdir -p dist && bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run clean && bun run build
